name: io.github.nhilbert/merkraum
title: Merkraum
description: Auditable knowledge memory for AI agents. Know what your AI believes — and prove it. Structured knowledge graph with belief tracking, contradiction detection, and full audit trail. 12 MCP tools for Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client.
